title: When Your Car Lease Is Over, What Should You Do Next?

title: George Russell Seizes Controversial F1 Austrian GP Pole Following Max Verstappen's Crash
summary: George Russell backed off in the final sector after saying he saw a single yellow flag following Max Verstappen's crash in turn 9 and still completed the best lap of the day in qualifying for the Austrian Grand Prix. The Stewards say no further investigation is needed.

title: Feds Want to Drop Requirement for Autonomous Cars to Have a Brake Pedal
